special_mechanics.name: Acrobatics
special_mechanics.description: Learnable skill with single proficiency level affecting player character movement and evasion capabilities

special_mechanics.name: Exploration Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player character is relatively unguided with no map assistance, promoting watchful exploration and environmental interaction

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay description mentioning Acrobatics skill and exploration mechanics but lacks specific physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values). No technical documentation on sub-pixel systems, movement speeds, or jump mechanics available in provided sources.
